nasb.text: Then he charged them saying, “Thus you shall do in the fear of the Lord, faithfully and wholeheartedly.

esv.text: And he charged them: “Thus you shall do in the fear of the Lord, in faithfulness, and with your whole heart:

cnv.text: 約沙法吩咐他們說：“你們要以敬畏耶和華的心，忠心和盡心辦事。

ccb.text: 约沙法训导他们说：“你们要怀着敬畏耶和华的心，全心全意地办事。
